quotes: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
The earth has music for those who listen.
The trees are our elders, they have seen it all.
The snowflake falls, and the flower blooms, each in its own time.
In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
The deepest wisdom is rooted in darkness, yet it blossoms in light.
The soul is not a thing, it is a flame that flickers with every breath.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
The winter of our discontent is also the season of our transformation.
The tree that bends in the storm is stronger than the tree that resists.
The stars are the map of our destiny, and the universe is the compass that guides us.
The soul's journey is not a path, it is a landscape that unfolds with every step.
